overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime exploration of Night City's urban rooftops and waterfront. The player traverses rain-slicked surfaces beneath towering neon-lit skyscrapers, collects an item from a rooftop, and walks along a wooden dock extending over dark water with the city's glow reflecting off the waves.

events.description: camera tilts down from skyscrapers to reveal street level with sparse traffic below

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at towering skyscrapers, then tilting down to view the street below

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows rising vertically into the night sky
massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying product imagery on building facade
skyscraper with colorful vertical neon lighting along its edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of Night City's towering glass skyscrapers against the dark sky. The camera slowly tilts down, revealing the urban canyon and sparse traffic moving on the wet streets below, establishing the vertical scale and neon atmosphere of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with industrial equipment

events.description: player character stops to pick up shoes item from the rooftop, game loot UI appears briefly

agents.ego_description: walking carefully across the wet rooftop surface, stopping briefly to pick up an item from the ground

entered.detail: large industrial HVAC unit with metal casing and exhaust vents
rain-slicked corrugated metal decking reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
distant illuminated buildings and signage creating a glowing urban backdrop

segments.scene_description: The player moves onto a wet rooftop with industrial ventilation equipment, the metal surface reflecting the city's neon glow. The camera focuses on the path ahead before stopping to pick up a pair of shoes from the ground, indicated by the game's loot UI appearing on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock extending over dark harbor water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront dock, approaching the end of the pier with city lights reflecting on the water

entered.detail: wooden pier extending over dark water with embedded lighting along the edges
dark harbor water with rippling reflections of neon signs and building lights
modern low-rise structure with curved facade and horizontal window lighting
metal safety railing along the edge of the pier
distant docks and industrial buildings visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The player continues onto a wooden dock extending over dark water, leaving the rooftop behind. The path is lined with small lights reflecting off the wet planks, while a modern curved building looms on the right and the open harbor stretches to the left, creating a serene yet distinctly cyberpunk waterfront atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a towering urban vista to a quiet, rain-slicked waterfront. It begins with a dramatic upward view of glass skyscrapers against a dark sky before tilting down to reveal the neon-lit urban canyon and wet streets below. The perspective then shifts as the camera moves onto a metallic rooftop, gliding past industrial ventilation equipment to collect a pair of shoes from the reflective surface. As the player leaves the rooftop behind, the scene opens onto a wooden dock extending over dark water, where small lights glimmer on wet planks. The movement finally settles into a serene walk along the harbor, flanked by a modern curved building and the shimmering reflections of the city on the waves.
